title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving between Accounts linked to the same Tenant
scenario: Support data (Tenant info) is correctly retained when switching between different accounts linked to the same Tenant in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in with Account A (linked to Tenant A).
3. Navigate to Support → App and verify that Tenant A info is displayed.
4. Log out of Account A from the Account screen.
5. Log in with a different Account (also linked to Tenant A).
6. Navigate to Support → App and verify that Tenant A info is still displayed.
expected: Tenant A info is correctly retained and displayed in Support → App after switching to a different account linked to the same Tenant.
